form.formComment: Didn't do much at the last run, 7th (Sr1) over 2050m at Port Pirie beaten 22 m by Rolling Remona (2:29.20) in NR 41 to 46 on March 31 at $34. Before that was well back in the run when 9th (Fr5) over 1800m at Globe Derby Park beaten 50 m by Hy Filante (2:10.50) in NR 41 to 45 on March 24 at $151. Not keen.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tired over the concluding stages to eventually be beaten 48.0m.

form.formComment: Last start 10th (Sr1) over 2230m at Globe Derby Park beaten 30 m by Whata Optimist (2:45.10) in NR 44 to 49 on April 4 at $84.60. At his previous start 8th (Fr1) over 1800m after showing early speed at Globe Derby Park was 9th-12.8 at the bell, beaten 18 m by Whata Optimist (2:11.40) in NR 43 to 48 on March 23 at $3.10. Capable of more than he has shown recently. Can improve enough to feature.

form.formComment: Improved last start with a game effort when 3rd (Sr3) over 1800m at Globe Derby Park, at the bell was 5th-12.4 beaten 16 m by Hy Filante (2:10.50) in NR 41 to 45 on March 24 at $11. Can improve. From a low draw is expected to measure up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Improved last start with a game effort when 3rd (Sr3) over 1800m at Globe Derby Park, at the bell was 5th-12.4 beaten 16 m by Hy Filante (2:10.50) in NR 41 to 45 on March 24 at $11. Can improve. From a low draw is expected to measure up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Utilised the sprint lane to win the race.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into fourth behind Road Star at this track over 2070m in a NR 43 to 46 on March 4 at $7. Then a handy effort when beaten by 1.1 m finishing second behind Linxx at this track over 2070m in a NR 41 to 46 on March 30 at $3.70. Among the better chances.

formComments.comment: Two back was well beaten into fourth behind Road Star at this track over 2070m in a NR 43 to 46 on March 4 at $7. Then a handy effort when beaten by 1.1 m finishing second behind Linxx at this track over 2070m in a NR 41 to 46 on March 30 at $3.70. Among the better chances.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Out of position as the start was effected, due to the false start.

form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 9th (Fr6) over 2230m at Globe Derby Park, beaten 25 m by Whata Optimist (2:45.10) in NR 44 to 49 on April 4 at $29.20. Two runs back 9th (Fr1) over 2230m after showing early speed at Globe Derby Park was leading by.5m on the pegs at the bell, beaten 35 m by Kathys Free (2:45.30) in NR 50 to 57 on December 22 at $13. Well-placed and should improve sharply.

Well-placed and should improve sharply.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Gave ground from the 500m to eventually be beaten 33.0m.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, 6th (Fr5) over 2230m after being wide early at Globe Derby Park, at the bell was 3rd-2.8 beaten 19 m by Whata Optimist (2:45.10) in NR 44 to 49 on April 4 at $18.90. Before that 8th (Fr1) over 1800m at Globe Derby Park beaten 16 m by Letsstartinheaven (2:10.80) in NR 50 to 59 on March 28 at $101. Not keen on his chances in this line-up.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into seventh behind Whata Optimist at Globe Derby Park over 2230m in a NR 44 to 49 on April 4 at $7. Performed better the start before where she tracked on the speed and boxed on steadily; won by a head when driven back in the field, (Fr2) held up early, at this track (2:31.70) beating Cyclone Brenda in NR 47 to 54 on March 30 at $6 at the bell was 2nd-6.9. In the mix if on-song.

In the mix if on-song.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Had a tendency to over-race when racing in a trailing position near the 1000m.

form.formComment: Last start surrendered the lead and finished 4th (Fr1) over 1800m at Globe Derby Park, beaten 5 m by Neds Beach (2:12.80) in NR 42 to 47 on April 11 at $8. At the run before was driven from back in the field when 4th (Fr6) over 1800m at Globe Derby Park, beaten 5.5 m by Rocknroll Yankee (2:13.30) in NR 44 to 49 on March 28 at $17. This looks a nice race.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr4) over 1800m after being wide early at Globe Derby Park was 2nd-2.4 at the bell, beaten 15 m by Hereforagoodtime (2:13.90) in NR 48 to 55 on March 11 at $12. At the start before 5th (Fr3) over 1609m at this track, at the bell was 2nd-2.2 beaten 7 m by Per Ardua Ad Astra (1:58.30) in NR 47 to 54 GROUP on March 4 at $12. Can do a lot better in this suitable contest.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into sixth after being driven well back, behind Signature Look at Victor Harbor over 2160m in a NR 50 to 57 on April 5 at $29.40. Performed better the start before with a good run despite getting well back, when 2nd (Fr2) over 1800m at Globe Derby Park, at the bell was 3rd-4.4 beaten 1.5 m by Trailblazer (2:12.70) in NR 49 to 56 on March 23 at $3.90. Hard to go past on best form.
